mnemonics: CRIB Exam: Cover Requirements, Implementation, Boundaries
keyPoints: Focus on core software engineering life cycle phases (requirements, design, implementation, testing, deployment)
Understand different project management methodologies (Waterfall, Agile, Scrum) and their differences
Be able to discuss risk management, quality assurance, and project planning techniques
commonMistakes: Confusing Agile and Waterfall methodology characteristics
Neglecting to address non-functional requirements (e.g., security, scalability) in answers
Failing to provide specific examples when discussing abstract concepts
